articles.title: Traders Echo Pope Leo's Warning That AI Could Trigger Mass Job Losses
articles.description: Traders on Kalshi are giving a 60% chance that U.S. unemployment will cross 8% at some point before 2030 and a 47% chance that it will cross 9% during the same period, largely as a result of AI
articles.content: Pope Leo XIV's warning that artificial intelligence could produce a "social calamity" through mass unemployment has found echo on Wall Street, where prediction market traders are increasingly pricing in the possibility of a much weaker U.S. labor mar... [2575 chars]

articles.description: What happens when an AI recommends a tool?
articles.content:
Microsoft researchers observed cybercriminals adapting SEO poisoning tactics to AI platforms, tricking AI into recommending spoofed utility sites like HWMonitor and CrystalDiskInfo

articles.title: Salesforce's beat fails to convince market that software can survive AI
articles.description: Salesforce is doing everything it can to signal to the market that this year's sell-off is unwarranted.
articles.content: Salesforce on Wednesday evening delivered better-than-expected quarterly results, but it wasn't enough to convince the market that AI will help — not hurt — its enterprise software business. Revenue in the quarter ended April 30 rose 13.3% year over ... [6534 chars]

articles.title: Groupon laying off 400 employees in AI shift
articles.description: Groupon, the Chicago-based online marketplace, is slashing up to 400 positions — nearly a fourth of its worldwide workforce — in a plan to rebuild as an AI-native company.
articles.content:

articles.title: Wall Street hits record highs as AI rally pauses
articles.description: Rising healthcare and consumer stocks lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average on Wednesday to a record closing high, while the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq were steady, as investors took a pause from the AI-led rally while cautiously watching Middle East peace talks. Fractional gains were enough to push the S&P 500 index and Nasdaq to closing record highs for the second day in a row.
articles.content: NEW YORK: Rising healthcare and consumer stocks lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average on Wednesday to a record closing high, while the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq were steady, as investors took a pause from the AI-led rally while cautiously watching Mid... [3648 chars]

articles.title: London Reclaims Crown as Europe's Technology Hub
articles.description: London has surpassed Paris to become Europe's leading technology center once again, driven by strong investments in artificial intelligence and deep tech. The city raised $17.7 billion last year, housing 138 unicorns. Globally, London ranks fourth, led by investments in AI, fintech, and life sciences.
articles.content:
London has retaken the title as Europe's top technology hub, overtaking Paris due to increased investment in artificial intelligence and deep tech sectors, as per Dealroom's Global Tech Ecosystem Index 2026.
The city's resurgence is credited to robus... [506 chars]
